name: Regatta
description: A weekend regatta scattered to the horizon — hulls, mainsails and a breeze that re-trims every boat per redraw.

code.style: --hull: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --cloth: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* hull and sail share one emitted heel angle so the boat leans as one */ --heel: @r(-8deg, 8deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 64%; width: 56%; height: 16%; background: var(--hull); clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 78% 100%, 22% 100%); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transform: rotate(@var(--heel)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; top: @rand(14%, 24%); width: 40%; height: 48%; background: var(--cloth); clip-path: polygon(@rand(40%, 60%) 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(@var(--heel)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
